user.title: EPEver BLE Charge Controller
user.description: Select your EPEver charge controller from the discovered Bluetooth devices.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the controller. Minimum 10 seconds.

manual.title: EPEver BLE Charge Controller
manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your charge controller manually.

data_description.mac: Bluetooth MAC address (e.g. AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF). Pair the device first with `bluetoothctl`.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the controller. Minimum 10 seconds.

error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX.
